{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Soulbound magic
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Rojric Little]]'s appearance and voice are a result of [[Soulbound magic]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
